name: International Social Security Agreement Exemption

eligibility.description: Taxpayers working in a foreign country with which the U.S. has a social security agreement (Totalization Agreement) and who are paying into that country's system.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts self-employment income from U.S. self-employment tax if the income is subject to the social security system of a foreign country under a Totalization Agreement.
